overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a samurai character walking along a wooden cliffside path overlooking a vibrant turquoise ocean. The character stops to observe the coastal scenery as a distant sailing ship appears on the horizon before the scene fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden walkway along white coastal cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden planks of the cliffside path with the ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: tall white rocky cliff face rising immediately to the left of the path
weathered wooden plank pathway built into the cliffside
vibrant turquoise ocean water with white wave crests
natural stone arch formation standing in the water offshore
tall mountain peak visible on the horizon with mist around its base
green trees and shrubs growing on top of the cliff

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a narrow wooden pathway built into white coastal cliffs. The bright midday sun illuminates the turquoise ocean to the right, with a distinctive rock arch and distant mountain visible along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: clifftop observation point overlooking the ocean

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the cliff edge to observe the coastal view
large traditional sailing ship with white sails appears on the distant horizon

agents.ego_description: standing still at the overlook, turning to gaze at the waves crashing on the rocks below and scanning the horizon

entered.detail: dark rocky coastline with waves breaking against the stones
sandy beach visible at the base of the cliffs
large white rock formations jutting into the water
traditional wooden sailing vessel with two white sails on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: Having stopped at the cliff's edge, the character stands on the wooden platform observing the coastal scenery. The camera pans to reveal the rocky shoreline and beach below, then shifts to the open ocean where a distant sailing ship appears on the horizon before the scene fades to darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a focused walk along a cliffside path to a wide, contemplative vista of the open sea. It begins with the samurai character traversing a narrow wooden pathway built into white coastal cliffs, with the bright midday sun illuminating a turquoise ocean and a distant rock arch. As the character reaches the cliff's edge and comes to a halt, the camera pans away from the path to reveal the rugged rocky shoreline and beach stretching below. The perspective then shifts further toward the horizon, where a lone sailing ship emerges against the vast water before the entire scene gradually fades to darkness.
